parser_action: Intercept function declaration specifiers; attach MSL entry stage token (`tok::kw_kernel` etc.).
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Recognized as contextual or hard keywords when `-x metal` / `-fmetal` is active

parser_action: Parse address space type qualifiers; attach `Qualifiers::AddressSpace` (`LangAS::opencl_global` -> `as1` device, `as2` constant, `as3` threadgroup).
ast_node_created: AttributedType / QualType with exact address space modifier (`as1..as9`)
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Lexer token `tok::kw_device` maps directly to target address space index in `TargetInfo`

parser_action: Parse C++11 double bracket attribute syntax `[[...]]`; evaluate integer constant expression `N` inside parentheses.
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Recognized on `ParmVarDecl` of entry functions and struct fields

parser_action: Parse zero-argument entry stage parameter attributes `[[...]]`.
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Injects implicit system register read (`s0..s2`) during CodeGen

parser_action: Parse vertex/fragment pipeline input/output semantics attributes.
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Validates struct field packing and link-time interface compatibility

parser_action: Parse MSL standard library C++ template specialization syntax (`ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl`).
cleanroom_implementation_notes: MSL stdlib headers map template instantiations to internal `__metal_*_t` opaque types

parser_action: Parse compiler directives controlling loop unrolling and floating point contraction.
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Translates into LLVM loop metadata `!llvm.loop.unroll.count` and `fast-math` flags
